panel_collapse.instant_collapse_fix: Dragging below the threshold now applies the collapsed visual state immediately and uses the collapsed rail width so expanded words do not remain squished before pointer release.
performance_safeguards: Expanded content is hidden while the live drag preview is collapsed.
Transitions remain disabled during active drag.
Collapsed rail keeps the Layers label visible.
Previous expanded width is preserved for re-expansion.

display_changes: All current seed zones limit option added.
Layer status reports all-level zone counts.
Legend keeps presentation-derived utilization caveat visible.
school_utilization_layer.caveat: Presentation-derived SY 2024-2025 utilization seed. Needs verification and does not imply official capacity scoring.

frontend_display.display_scope: Methodology/data transparency only; not selected parcel-specific.

validation_results.lea_importer_dry_run: passed; 4 input rows, 60 long rows, Enrollment total 36287
validation_results.npm_dev_cfs_no_restart: passed; existing FastAPI and Next.js services healthy

runtime_smoke_tests.browser_smoke: Cabarrus FutureScape loaded; no captured console errors; Methodology text present

remaining_limitations: LEA pupil context is district-level only and cannot support school-level capacity scoring.
Official school-level enrollment, functional capacity, available seats, and grade-level capacity files are still needed.
Only matched presentation-derived utilization seed zones render in the school utilization layer; current all-level count is 31, not all 37 seed rows.
School capacity remains Capacity Data Needed / Not Scored.
